channel.title: Data Visualization on Danielle Cosme
channel.description: Recent content in Data Visualization on Danielle Cosme

item.title: Comparison of University of Oregon GE Salaries
item.description: load packages library(tidyverse) library(readxl) define palette area = wesanderson::wes_palette("Zissou1", 6, "continuous")[2:6] load data data = read_excel("~/Documents/GTFF/Winter Appts.xlsx") %>% rename("ID" = `GTFF Knack ID`, "FTE" = `Appt Percent`, "MonthlySalary" = `Monthly Salary`, "Department" = `Department Connection`, "Membership" = `Member Status (static)`) tidy data # check duplicate IDs duplicates = data[duplicated(data$ID),] %>% arrange(ID) data.dup = data %>% filter(ID %in% duplicates$ID) %>% group_by(ID) %>% mutate(MonthlySalary1 = sum(MonthlySalary), FTE1 = sum(FTE)) %>% group_by(ID) %>% slice(1) %>% mutate(MonthlySalary1 = ifelse(FTE1 > 50, MonthlySalary, MonthlySalary1), FTE1 = ifelse(FTE1 > 50, FTE, FTE1), MonthlySalary = MonthlySalary1, FTE = FTE1) %>% select(-c(MonthlySalary1, FTE1)) # tidy data1 = data %>% filter(!

item.title: Descriptives for Hopelab
item.description: Well-being descriptives for Hopelab. load libraries if (!require(tidyverse)) { install.packages('tidyverse') } if (!require(devtools)) { install.packages('devtools') } if (!require(scorequaltrics)) { devtools::install_github('jflournoy/qualtrics') } if (!require(ggcorrplot)) { install.packages('ggcorrplot') } questionnaires to score CESD-10 = CES-Depression, 10 items scores > 10 = considered depressed GAD7 = Generalized Anxiety Disorder, 7 items PANAS = Positive and Negative Affect Schedule PSS = Perceived Stress Scale SWLS = Satisfaction with Life Scale ULS-8 = UCLA Loneliness Scale, 8 items scores > 8 = probable anxiety diagnosis Priorities define variables and paths cred_file_location = path to your Qualtrics credential file.

item.title: FP Pilot GPS
item.description: This code is a first pass analysis of the goals and priorities survey. Get and clean the data Define variables and paths cred_file_location = path to your Qualtrics credential file. You’ll need to generate this via Qualtrics using the instructios above. id_column_name = subject ID column name in Qualtrics survey; can be a regular expression cred_file_location = '~/credentials.yaml.DEFAULT' sid_column_name = '(SID|ExternalDataReference|qid)' survey_name_filter = 'Freshman Project T|CheckIn' sid_pattern = 'FP[0-9]{3}' exclude_sid = 'FP999' # subject IDs to exclude identifiableData = c('EmailAddress', 'IPAddress') # exclude when printing duplicates 'EmailAddress', output_file_dir = '~/Documents/code/score-qualtrics/' rubric_dir = '/Users/danicosme/Dropbox (PfeiBer Lab)/FreshmanProject/Qualtrics/Scoring_Rubrics' Packages if (!
